candidates.why: Only a component of equity, not total book equity.

Balancing line, not substantive equity measure.

variables.notes: Selected TOTAL EQUITY because it is lower than Total Equity by exactly the non-controlling interest amount, indicating it represents parent/owners' equity excluding NCI.
